creator: akuz84@gmail.com
text:
Hello!
There is wrong link to announce about RC4 on the https://www.freebsd.org/news/newsflash/#2023-11-03:2 page. Wrong link is https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-current/2023-October/004928.html.
Right link is https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-current/2023-November/004928.html.
